opinion.h1: UIHLEIN v. STATE OF WISCONSIN, 273 U.S. 642 (1926)
opinion.h2: Herman A. UIHLEIN, August E. Uihlein, George Uihlein et al., plaintiffs in error, v. The STATE OF WISCONSIN, Neele B. Neelen, Public Administrator of Milwaukee County, et al. No. 175.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. George P. Miller, Edwin S. Mack, and Arthur W. Fairchild, all of Milwaukee, Wis., for plaintiff in error.
Mr. Herman L. Ekern, of Madison, Wis., for defendants in error.
Reversed on the authority of Schlesinger v. Wisconsin, 270 U.S. 230, 46 S. Ct. 260, 43 A. L. R. 1224.[ Uihlein v. State of Wisconsin 273 U.S. 642 (1926) ]
